testcase.name: test_create_new_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 2 profiles now assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = len([{'avatar_color': '#FF0099', 'created_at': '2026-03-19T02:09:14.988768+00:00', 'id': '0dd8a713-3d02-4aa6-be50-7671caf70eba', 'is_active': False, ...}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_profiles_and_history.py:56: in test_create_new_profile assert len(profiles) >= 2, "Should have at least 2 profiles now" E AssertionError: Should have at least 2 profiles now E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'avatar_color': '#FF0099', 'created_at': '2026-03-19T02:09:14.988768+00:00', 'id': '0dd8a713-3d02-4aa6-be50-7671caf70eba', 'is_active': False, ...}])

testcase.name: test_delete_profile
testcase.failure: tests/test_profiles_and_history.py:138: in test_delete_profile assert delete_response.status_code == 200, f"Delete failed: {delete_response.text}" E AssertionError: Delete failed: {"detail":"Cannot delete the only profile"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
